title: Quantum Counting Algorithms
description: Master quantum counting algorithms that combine Grover search with amplitude estimation to count the number of solutions to search problems, achieving quadratic speedup over classical counting methods.
learningObjectives: Understand the connection between counting and amplitude estimation
Implement quantum counting using phase estimation on the Grover operator
Analyze the precision and query complexity of quantum counting
Apply quantum counting to constraint satisfaction problems
Compare quantum counting with classical random sampling approaches
